prestazioni: Replace the original 948cc A-Series (9CC) engine with a fully built 1275cc A+ Series block (12A+) featuring a forged crankshaft (73.4mm stroke), forged 80.26mm Mahle pistons, and steel conrods from a Mini Cooper S (1275cc spec). Pair with a Kent Cams 276-degree camshaft (part #276H) and adjustable vernier timing gear for optimized lift and duration (0.390" lift, 276° duration).

Install a custom-built ITG Maxogen air filter (part #MG-1275) paired with a 45mm Weber DCOE sidedraft carburetor (45DCOE9) on a bespoke alloy intake manifold (fabricated by RPI Engineering). Use a 36mm choke size with 155 main jets and 170 air correctors for optimal mid-range torque. Include a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system with a 4-2-1 header (manifold by Maniflow) and a free-flowing RC40 rear silencer (by Scorpion).

Upgrade the suspension with a full polybush kit (SuperPro SPF0105K) and adjustable Spax coilovers (part #SPX2201) with 200lb/in springs for precise damping control. Fit a 19mm front anti-roll bar (by Moss Motors) and a 16mm rear bar (custom-fabricated by SNG Barratt) to reduce body roll. Use Minilite 13x5.5" magnesium wheels (part #ML1355) with 165/70R13 Yokohama A052 semi-slick tires for improved grip.
estetica: Replace the factory steel bonnet with a lightweight fiberglass replica (by Fibreglass 2000) featuring a functional louvered vent (3" x 12" opening) for heat extraction. Paint in original Iris Blue (code BCC 908) with a clear bra (by Suntek PPF) for protection.

Install a custom front splitter (by RML Group) in carbon fiber, extending 2.5" from the bumper for aerodynamic balance. Add a rear ducktail spoiler (by SpriteSpot) in matching Iris Blue, with a 4" height and integrated LED brake light (Osram 12V).

Fit a bespoke interior roll cage (by Safety Devices, part #SD032) in 4130 chromoly steel, powder-coated in satin black. Replace the stock seats with lightweight Kevlar bucket seats (by Corbeau GTS II) upholstered in black Alcantara with Iris Blue stitching. Add a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter) with a quick-release hub (NRG Innovations).
